subject: Dept. of
Education
bill.title: Education, Dept. of - As introduced, changes from September 1 to December 1 the date by which the department must compile and publish to its website a directory of the name and contact information for the apprenticeship training program contact for each public high school. - Amends TCA Title 4 and Title 49.

action.description: P2C, caption bill, held on desk - pending amdt.
